text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
23 
CONTRACT_ID 
LABEL: 
Contract Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a plan has with CMS. 
This field is a key that links the plan sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Five-digit alpha/numeric value 
COMMENT: 
You need to know both the contract number
